text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ "WORLD’S MOST POWERFUL RESET!!!" - Trump Announces His Daily Delusion Schedule
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ “世界上最强大的重置！！！” - 特朗普宣布他的每日妄想时间表

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese political figures opposed to Hezbollah are calling on the Beirut government to open peace negotiations with Israel, according to the Lebanese newspaper Nidaa al-Watan. The officials called for a small negotiating delegation free from sectarian constraints, a unilateral ceasefire declaration to Hezbollah with a short timeline for disarmament, and outreach to Arab states and the Vatican to build diplomatic support. A Lebanese official told the paper the government is the only body authorized to negotiate with Israel and said Lebanon should "copy the Pakistani model", demand a limited ceasefire and begin talks immediately after it takes effect. The paper also reports that negotiations between U.S., Israeli, and Lebanese ambassadors will begin Tuesday in Washington, with follow-up talks expected in Cyprus. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据黎巴嫩《Nidaa al-Watan》报报道，反对真主党的黎巴嫩政治人物正呼吁贝鲁特政府与以色列开启和平谈判。官员们呼吁组建一个不受宗派限制的小型谈判代表团，向真主党宣布单方面停火并设定短期裁军时间表，并与阿拉伯国家和梵蒂冈接触以建立外交支持。一位黎巴嫩官员告诉该报，政府是唯一有权与以色列谈判的机构，并表示黎巴嫩应该“效仿巴基斯坦模式”，要求有限停火并在停火生效后立即开始会谈。该报还报道称，美国、以色列和黎巴嫩大使之间的谈判将于周二在华盛顿开始，后续会谈预计将在塞浦路斯进行。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump to the New York Post: "We're loading up the ships with the best ammunition, the best weapons ever made. If we don't have a deal, we will be using them, and we will be using them very effectively." Trump warns of military strikes if Iran talks fail, says U.S. warships are being rearmed with advanced weapons. Negotiations in Islamabad led by VP Vance aim to secure a deal after the ceasefire. Key issues: uranium stockpile, Strait of Hormuz, missile programs, sanctions relief. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普对《纽约邮报》表示：“我们正在用最好的弹药、有史以来制造的最好的武器装载船只。如果我们达不成协议，我们将使用它们，而且我们将非常有效地使用它们。”特朗普警告说，如果伊朗会谈失败，将进行军事打击，并称美国军舰正在重新装备先进武器。由副总统万斯领导的伊斯兰堡谈判旨在在停火后达成协议。关键问题：铀储备、霍尔木兹海峡、导弹计划、制裁减免。- 开源情报 推文

text: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ Saudi Regime Executes Citizen Over Childhood Protest Charges The Saudi regime executed Ali Hassan al-Subaiti on April 9, 2026, on fabricated “terrorism” charges dating back to when he was only 12 years old in the 2011-2012 Qatif protests. Arrested in 2017 at the age of 18 while seeking a driver’s license, he suffered 8.5 years of detention, torture, solitary confinement, and denial of legal defense. Saudi claims of joining a foreign terrorist group came with zero public proof - no documents, videos, or evidence of any kind. Rights groups say it relied only on tortured confessions from peaceful childhood protests. This is the 9th political execution in 2026 - just 8 days after Saud al-Faraj. At least 52 more remain at risk.
text_zh: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ 沙特政权因童年抗议指控处决公民 沙特政权于2026年4月9日处决了阿里·哈桑·阿尔-苏拜蒂（Ali Hassan al-Subaiti），罪名是捏造的“恐怖主义”指控，这些指控可追溯到他2011-2012年卡提夫抗议活动时，当时他年仅12岁。他于2017年18岁时在申请驾照时被捕，遭受了8.5年的拘留、酷刑、单独监禁和剥夺法律辩护权。沙特声称他加入了外国恐怖组织，但没有任何公开证据——没有任何文件、视频或任何形式的证据。人权组织表示，这仅依赖于他在童年和平抗议期间遭受酷刑后的供词。这是2026年的第9次政治处决——距离沙特·阿尔-法拉杰（Saud al-Faraj）被处决仅8天。至少还有52人面临风险。

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 Yep, unhinged Trump: We’re loading up the ships with the best ammunition, the best weapons ever made. If we don’t have a deal, we will be using them — and we will be using them very effectively. You’re dealing with people that we don’t know whether or not they tell the truth. To our face, they’re getting rid of all nuclear weapons… and then they go out to the press and say, ‘No, we’d like to enrich. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 是的，精神错乱的特朗普：我们正在用最好的弹药、有史以来制造的最好的武器装载船只。如果我们达不成协议，我们将使用它们——而且我们将非常有效地使用它们。你面对的是一群我们不知道他们是否说真话的人。当着我们的面，他们说要销毁所有核武器……然后他们出去对媒体说，‘不，我们想浓缩。’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: South Korea proposed a $17 billion supplementary budget to cushion the economic impact of the Iran conflict and rising oil prices. It includes cash payments to the bottom 70% of earners (about 36 million people), ranging from $65–$400 per person to offset energy and inflation costs.
text_zh: 韩国提议170亿美元的补充预算，以缓冲伊朗冲突和油价上涨带来的经济影响。其中包括向收入最低的70%的人群（约3600万人）发放现金，每人65至400美元，以抵消能源和通胀成本。

text: The White House warned staff not to place well-timed bets on prediction or futures markets after suspicious trades occurred just before Trump paused Iran strikes. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 白宫警告员工不要在特朗普暂停对伊朗打击前进行可疑交易后，在预测或期货市场上进行适时的押注。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced that they targeted a number of Israeli bulldozers that were working on demolishing houses in the town of Ayta al-Shaab with a rocket barrage in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，他们用火箭弹袭击了黎巴嫩南部艾塔阿尔沙布（Ayta al-Shaab）镇正在拆除房屋的几辆以色列推土机。@wfwitness

text: Trump: You’re dealing with people that we don’t know whether or not they tell the truth. To our face, they’re getting rid of all nuclear weapons… and then they go out to the press and say, ‘No, we’d like to enrich.’ Source: NY Post
text_zh: 特朗普：你面对的是一群我们不知道他们是否说真话的人。当着我们的面，他们说要销毁所有核武器……然后他们出去对媒体说，‘不，我们想浓缩。’ 来源：《纽约邮报》

text: Trump: We’re loading up the ships with the best ammunition, the best weapons ever made. If we don’t have a deal, we will be using them — and we will be using them very effectively. Source: NY Post
text_zh: 特朗普：我们正在用最好的弹药、有史以来制造的最好的武器装载船只。如果我们达不成协议，我们将使用它们——而且我们将非常有效地使用它们。来源：《纽约邮报》

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Additional footage from Hezbollah supporters gathering in Beirut against the Lebanese Government. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Footage showcases Hezbollah demonstrations against the Lebanese government following calls of direct negotiations from the iconic Hamra street in central Beirut. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党支持者在贝鲁特聚集反对黎巴嫩政府的更多视频。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 视频展示了真主党在贝鲁特市中心标志性的哈姆拉街呼吁直接谈判后，针对黎巴嫩政府的示威活动。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 YNET: President Donald Trump is expected to deliver a recorded speech and will not travel to Israel on April 23, as the ceremony falls on the final day of the ceasefire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 YNET：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普预计将发表录音演讲，不会在4月23日前往以色列，因为该仪式恰逢停火的最后一天。@wfwitness

text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَ الصَّابِرِينَ..
text_zh: 信道啊！你们当借坚忍和拜功，而求佑助。真主确是与坚忍的人同在的。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam on the Israeli attack against State Security personnel: “This painful tragedy increases our determination to reach a ceasefire that protects Lebanon and our people in the South.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese President Joseph aoun on the Israeli attack against state security personnel: Targeting state institutions and its security apparatuses will not deter Lebanon from holding onto its right to protect its land and safeguard its sovereignty. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆（Nawaf Salam）就以色列袭击国家安全人员表示：“这一痛苦的悲剧增加了我们达成保护黎巴嫩和我们在南方人民的停火协议的决心。” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）就以色列袭击国家安全人员表示：针对国家机构及其安全机构的行为，不会阻止黎巴嫩坚持其保护土地和维护主权的权利。@wfwitness

text: Back in 2008, when Ghalibaf was mayor of Tehran, he attended the World Economic Forum in Davos to tout economic opportunities in his city. The New York Times ran a piece on him, describing him as a "presidential contender." Asked about relations with the U.S., he replied, "If the United States can change its unilateral approach and replace it with a bilateral approach, then we can have dialogue." An aide then explained to the reporter that Iran wanted the United States to treat it as an equal partner, not as a renegade nation to be brought into line. All these years later, Ghalibaf is arriving in Islamabad with the authority of a president and with a mandate to hold historic talks with the U.S.
text_zh: 早在2008年，当卡利巴夫担任德黑兰市长时，他曾参加达沃斯世界经济论坛，推销他所在城市的经济机会。《纽约时报》刊登了一篇关于他的文章，称他为“总统候选人”。当被问及与美国的关系时，他回答说：“如果美国能改变其单边主义做法，并以双边做法取而代之，那么我们就可以进行对话。”一位助手随后向记者解释说，伊朗希望美国将其视为平等的伙伴，而不是一个需要被驯服的叛逆国家。多年后的今天，卡利巴夫带着总统的权威抵达伊斯兰堡，并肩负着与美国进行历史性会谈的使命。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 The Lebanese General Directorate of State Security announces the death of 13 members as a result of the targeting of the Nabatieh Government Serail building. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam on the Israeli attack against State Security personnel: “This painful tragedy increases our determination to reach a ceasefire that protects Lebanon and our people in the South.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩国家安全总局宣布，由于纳巴泰政府大楼遭到袭击，13名成员死亡。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆（Nawaf Salam）就以色列袭击国家安全人员表示：“这一痛苦的悲剧增加了我们达成保护黎巴嫩和我们在南方人民的停火协议的决心。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Fox: Israeli intelligence officials report that Iran is charging tolls to transit the Strait of Hormuz safely, seeking to further their control of the vital shipping route ahead of negotiations in Islamabad. "An Israeli intelligence official tells Fox News Iran is indeed demanding fees for the few vessels it's allowing to pass through the Strait Of Hormuz. This official adds the Strait is effectively under full IRGC control. They decide who gets to go through, but more importantly, who doesn't. I am told that there is intelligence being shared in the intel community about how Iran is trying to tighten its grip on this Strait ahead of the negotiations this weekend. Overnight, president Trump taking to True Social to talk about the issue saying, quote, Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable, some would say, of allowing oil to go to the straight of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have. With just eight vessels" @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 福克斯新闻：以色列情报官员报告称，伊朗正在对安全通过霍尔木兹海峡收取通行费，试图在伊斯兰堡谈判前进一步加强对这一重要航道的控制。“一位以色列情报官员告诉福克斯新闻，伊朗确实在对其允许通过霍尔木兹海峡的少数船只收取费用。这位官员补充说，海峡实际上处于伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的完全控制之下。他们决定谁可以通过，但更重要的是，谁不能通过。我被告知，情报界正在分享关于伊朗如何在周末谈判前试图加强对该海峡控制的情报。昨晚，特朗普总统在真实社交（True Social）上谈到这个问题时说，引用，伊朗在允许石油通过霍尔木兹海峡方面做得非常糟糕，有些人会说是可耻的。这不是我们达成的协议。只有八艘船只” @wfwitness

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 NEW: Iran has rebuilt Yahyabad railway bridge in Kashan, after it was bombed by Israel on April 7th Reconstruction efforts around the country, especially of vital infrastructure, are progressing at a rapid pace. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 最新：伊朗在4月7日被以色列轰炸后，重建了卡尚的Yahyabad铁路桥。全国各地的重建工作，特别是重要基础设施的重建，正在快速推进。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "❗️A Hezbullah drone attack today severely injured one Jewish soldier and another soldier moderately." It was my darling the FPV against a Humvee 😮‍💨
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“❗️今天真主党的一次无人机袭击严重炸伤了一名犹太士兵，另一名士兵中度受伤。” 是我亲爱的FPV击中了悍马车 😮‍💨

text: Trump considered firing Tulsi Gabbard after being frustrated with her less supportive stance on the Iran War. He even questioned her loyalty in private and began asking advisers whether she should be replaced. However, longtime ally Roger Stone stepped in and persuaded him to keep her, arguing that she had been loyal, didn’t deserve to be fired, and that removing her could create bad press and even boost her as a potential political rival. Source: Axios
text_zh: 特朗普在对图尔西·加巴德（Tulsi Gabbard）在伊朗战争问题上不够支持的立场感到沮丧后，曾考虑解雇她。他甚至私下质疑她的忠诚度，并开始询问顾问是否应该更换她。然而，长期盟友罗杰·斯通（Roger Stone）介入并说服他留下了她，理由是她一直很忠诚，不应该被解雇，而且解雇她可能会制造负面新闻，甚至可能提升她作为潜在政治对手的地位。来源：Axios
